overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a futuristic neon-lit city plaza at night. The character briefly falls to the ground before continuing to explore the crowded pedestrian area with towering skyscrapers and holographic advertisements.

events.description: ego turns to follow a pedestrian with pink hair moving across the plaza

agents.ego_description: walking through the plaza and looking around at pedestrians and buildings

pedestrian in green jacket walking away from camera

illuminated advertising screen on building facade

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a futuristic urban plaza surrounded by towering skyscrapers with vertical neon lights. The green industrial structure dominates the center view while pedestrians walk in various directions across the concrete plaza.

events.description: ego falls to the ground, view drops to show legs and pavement
ego begins to get up from the ground, view starts rising

agents.ego_description: lying on the ground after falling, then beginning to stand up

entered.detail: close-up view of concrete ground with trash and debris

segments.scene_description: The character falls to the concrete pavement, showing a ground-level view of the plaza floor with scattered trash. After a few seconds, the character begins to get up from the ground.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic downtown plaza with holographic ads

events.description: large blue holographic jellyfish advertisement becomes visible on building facade

agents.ego_description: walking through the plaza while observing the neon buildings and holographic advertisements

notable_agents.action: woman in white outfit running across the plaza toward the left

entered.detail: red illuminated corporate sign with white text on building
large blue holographic projection of a jellyfish-like creature on building
concrete benches along the edge of the plaza

segments.scene_description: Back on their feet, the character continues walking through the neon-lit plaza. The Kang Tao corporate sign and a massive blue holographic jellyfish advertisement become visible on the distant buildings while the character passes concrete benches.

scene_state.functional_zone: crowded pedestrian walkway with digital kiosks

events.description: ego begins following a man in a white jacket walking through the crowd

agents.ego_description: following a man in a white jacket through the crowd of pedestrians

notable_agents.action: man in white jacket walking forward through the crowd
man in red shirt and purple hat walking past camera

entered.detail: illuminated digital display kiosk showing advertisements

segments.scene_description: The character follows a man in a white jacket through a moderately crowded pedestrian area. Digital advertising kiosks line the right side of the walkway while various pedestrians walk in opposing directions.

scene_state.functional_zone: plaza with large holographic displays and neon towers

agents.ego_description: continuing to walk through the plaza passing various pedestrians

notable_agents.action: man in brown coat walking toward camera

entered.detail: cluster of multiple illuminated advertising screens on building faces

segments.scene_description: The character continues through the plaza approaching large holographic displays. The blue jellyfish holographic advertisement is now much closer and more prominent on the left, while towering neon skyscrapers fill the center view.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a neon-lit futuristic plaza that shifts from a wide urban vista to a ground-level perspective before returning to a crowded pedestrian thoroughfare. It begins with a walk past towering skyscrapers and a dominant green industrial structure, where pedestrians scatter across a concrete plaza. The camera suddenly drops to the pavement, offering a low-angle view of scattered trash before the character pushes themselves back up to a standing position. As the character regains their footing, the view expands to reveal a Kang Tao corporate sign and a massive blue holographic jellyfish in the distance, passing concrete benches while following a man in a white jacket past digital advertising kiosks. The scene finally culminates as the camera pushes deeper into the crowd, bringing the towering neon skyscrapers and the glowing blue jellyfish advertisement into sharp, prominent focus.
